coreMeaning.cn: 蹒跚；摇摇欲坠（第三人称单数）
coreMeaning.en: third person singular of totter; moves unsteadily

coreMeaning.cn: 摇摇晃晃的；步履蹒跚的

coreMeaning.en: a tropical American bird with a large brightly colored beak

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: toucan = 来自图皮语，热带巨嘴鸟

coreMeaning.en: to bring a body part into contact with; to have an effect on emotionally

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: touch = 用手触摸，也引申为感动

coreMeaning.en: a display screen that responds to touch
able to be touched; capable of being affected emotionally

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: touch + able = 可以被触碰的

coreMeaning.en: the landing of an aircraft; a scoring play in American football

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: touch(接触)+down(向下)=着陆；橄榄球触地得分

coreMeaning.en: exclamation acknowledging a clever or effective point in argument

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: touché来自击剑，被说中了=承认对方观点有效
touch + ed = 被感动的；(俚语)脑子被碰了=有点傻

coreMeaning.en: one that touches; an extremely close thing
plural of touch; acts of touching

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: touchy + ily = 以神经质方式

coreMeaning.en: the quality of being touchy or oversensitive
causing a feeling of sadness or sympathy; moving
either of the two long boundary lines of a football pitch

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: touch(接触)+line(线)=球触线出界处的边线

coreMeaning.en: a point of contact between a consumer and a company; a point of interaction

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: touch(接触)+point(点)=客户接触品牌的触点

coreMeaning.en: an electronic display screen that responds to touch
a standard or criterion for judging quality

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: touch(触碰测试)+stone(石头)=用来测试黄金纯度的石头→标准

coreMeaning.en: soft decayed wood used as tinder; said when touching wood for luck

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: touch(触)+wood(木)=触木祈福；腐木引火材料
touch + y = 被稍微触碰就有反应=易怒的

coreMeaning.en: strong and resilient; difficult; physically or mentally forceful

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tough = 坚韧耐用，也指困难

coreMeaning.en: informal term for a tough person or a difficult problem

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tough + ie = 口语化的硬汉/难题

coreMeaning.en: the quality of being tough; durability and resilience
plural of tough (as noun); rough violent persons
a city in southern France; also a breed of goose

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Toulouse = 法国南部的历史名城

coreMeaning.en: a small wig or hairpiece to cover baldness

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: toupee = 法语借词，用来遮盖秃顶的假发
